allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Mini ServiceNow platform with App Engine

Full ITSM platform featuring:
- Incident, Change, Problem management with state machines
- CMDB with CI types and relationships
- Service Catalog with request workflows
- Knowledge Base with article management
- Workflow engine with event-driven automation
- Webhook integrations and notification channels
- AI provider integration with prompt management
- Form builder with conditional logic and drag-drop
- Reporting engine with chart visualizations
- App Engine for low-code custom application development
- Visual workflow builder with reactflow
- Dynamic CRUD for custom tables with auto-numbering
- Dashboard designer with widget-based layouts

Stack: React + Mantine UI, Node/Express + Knex/PostgreSQL, Docker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add bidirectional integration providers with OAuth2, inbound webhooks, and seed data

Implements first-class integrations for 8 external apps \(GitHub, GitLab, Jira,
PagerDuty, Microsoft Teams, Azure DevOps, Datadog, Grafana\) with a pluggable
provider abstraction layer. Includes OAuth2 authorization flow, inbound webhook
handling with per-provider signature verification, integration links on records,
22 provider-specific workflow actions, auto-incident creation from monitoring
alerts, admin provider gallery UI, and seed data with sample integrations and
linked external resources. Updates README with new architecture docs and API
endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
